hero.title: The Booking Engine for Private Transportation
hero.subtitle: Embeddable widget. High conversion. Zero hassle.

demoSection.label: Experience It Live
demoSection.title: Your Customer Books in Seconds
demoSection.description: The widget adapts to any website design. Travelers complete their booking in under 2 minutes.

embeddableWidget.title: Embeddable Widget
embeddableWidget.description: Integrate with a single script. Works on WordPress, React, any site.

integratedPayments.title: Integrated Payments
integratedPayments.description: Stripe, PayPal, MercadoPago. Payment processed inside the widget.

multilanguage.title: Multi-Language
multilanguage.description: English, Spanish, Portuguese. Automatic browser language detection.

realTimeAvailability.title: Real-Time Availability
realTimeAvailability.description: Calendar shows only available dates and times.

controlPanel.title: Control Panel
controlPanel.description: Manage bookings, drivers, vehicles, and reports.

integration.title: Ready to Integrate?
integration.description: Just copy and paste this code into your website. The widget loads automatically.

step2.title: Where & When
step2.subtitle: Select your zone, date, and time
step2.arrivalSubtitle: Enter your arrival and destination details

step4.title: Order Summary
step4.subtitle: Review your booking and add optional services

flight.title: Flight Information
flight.pickupRecommendation: We recommend scheduling pickup 3 hours before your flight

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.message: We've sent the details to your email.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number (min. 7 digits)
validation.pastDate: Date cannot be in the past
validation.departureBeforeArrival: Departure date must be after arrival date
validation.invalidFlightNumber: Please enter a valid flight number

summary.title: Your Booking
summary.empty: Complete the steps to see your booking summary.

paypal.invalidClient: PayPal credentials are invalid. Please contact the administrator.
paypal.authFailed: PayPal authentication failed. Please try again later.

admin.accessDeniedDesc: This section is only available for system administrators.
admin.airportDesc: These airports will appear in the booking widget for customers to select
admin.bulkImportPlaceholder:
Enter hotel names separated by commas or one per line...

Example:
Hotel Cancun, Hotel Maya, Hotel Riviera
 or:
Hotel Cancun
Hotel Maya
Hotel Riviera
admin.clearTestDataDesc: Permanently delete all booking records for your account. This action cannot be undone.
admin.clearTestDataWarning: This will permanently delete all your bookings. This action cannot be undone.
admin.companiesDesc: Manage client companies and their subscriptions
admin.companyContactDesc: Shown in the PDF voucher sent to customers
admin.companyProfileDesc: Manage your company profile and appearance
admin.configureServiceTypes: Configure your service types and their options
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
admin.couponsDesc: Manage discount codes for annual subscriptions
admin.depositFixedAmountDesc: Fixed amount the customer pays as deposit. The balance is due at service time.
admin.depositOptionDesc: Let customers pay a deposit instead of the full amount. The balance is due at service time.
admin.destinationsDesc: Manage hotels and destinations within each zone
admin.emailConfigured: SMTP is configured — confirmation emails will be sent automatically
admin.emailEnabledDesc: Automatically send confirmation emails when a booking is created
admin.emailMessageDesc: This message appears at the top of the confirmation email
admin.emailNotConfigured: SMTP not configured — add your email server details below
admin.emailNotificationsDesc: Send confirmation emails to customers after booking
admin.emailSettingsDesc: Configure confirmation emails sent to your customers
admin.emailStatusInfo: When enabled, every new booking triggers an automatic email with a PDF voucher to the customer and a notification to you.
admin.emailSubjectDesc: The booking code will be appended automatically
admin.highlightsPlaceholder: e.g. Mayan ruins, Cenote swim, Beach time (comma separated)
admin.hourlyServiceActive: This service is currently active and visible to customers
admin.hourlyServiceDesc: Vehicle and driver at customer's disposal
admin.hourlyServiceInfo: When activated, customers will see "By the Hour" as a booking option. Pricing is based on your vehicle hourly rates.
admin.liveModeActive: Live Mode — Real payments will be processed
admin.liveModeDesc: Make sure your Stripe/PayPal credentials are for live/production environment.
admin.noAirports: No airports yet. Add your first airport above.
admin.noCompaniesFilter: No companies match the current filter
admin.noCoupons: No coupons yet. Create your first discount code.
admin.noDataAvailable: No data available for the selected date range
admin.noOptionalServicesDesc: Add services like shopping stops, car seats, etc.
admin.noTours: No tours yet. Add your first tour above.
admin.optionalServicesDesc: Manage add-on services customers can select during booking
admin.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
admin.paymentSettingsDesc: Configure PayPal and Stripe payment gateways
admin.pickupInstructionsDesc: Instructions for the customer on how to find their driver at the airport. Shown in both the email and the PDF voucher.
admin.pricingDesc: Set prices for each vehicle in each zone
admin.smtpDesc: Configure your email server. We recommend using SendGrid, Mailgun, AWS SES, or Gmail SMTP.
admin.smtpFromDesc: This is the sender address customers will see
admin.testModeActive: Test Mode Active — No real charges will be made
admin.testModeDesc: Customers can complete bookings without being charged. Use this to test the full payment flow.
admin.toursDesc: These tours will appear for customers when they select Private Tour service
admin.vehiclesDesc: Manage your fleet. Each vehicle has its own price table per zone.
admin.zonesDesc: Manage pricing zones for your service area
admin.confirmActivate: Activate this subscription? The payment was received.
admin.confirmRecordPayment: Record a payment for this active subscription?
admin.noServices: No services yet. Activate a service above or click "Add Service" to create a custom one.
admin.airportTransfersDesc: Configure airport pickup and drop-off services
admin.byTheHourDesc: Configure hourly charter and disposal services

widgetPreview.description: Copy the code below to embed the booking widget on your website
widgetPreview.directLinkDesc: Share this link with your customers
widgetPreview.embedInstructions: Choose one of the following methods to add the widget to your site:

register.subtitle: Booking Engine for Transportation Companies
register.trialDescription: Your card will not be charged for {{days}} days.
register.trialActive: Your {{days}}-day free trial is active until {{date}}.
register.apiKeyDesc: Use this key to embed the booking widget on your website.
register.stripeNotConfiguredDesc: We are currently setting up our secure payment system. Registration will be available shortly. Please try again later or contact us for assistance.
register.paymentSetupDesc: We are currently configuring our secure payment system. Registration will be available shortly.
